#

#    pip-compile --generate-hashes --output-file requirements.txt requirements.in
#
# NOTE: The hashes below are ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDERS for this training demo.
#       Real hashes must be generated by running pip-compile on your own machine.
#       Never commit manually crafted hashes to a production lock file.
#       Run: pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in
#
# FIX: Every package (direct AND transitive) is pinned to an exact version.
#      SHA-256 hashes verify the downloaded wheel/sdist has not been tampered with.
#      Installing with: pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt
#      will reject any package whose hash does not match — preventing
#      dependency confusion, typosquatting, and supply-chain substitution attacks.
